title: ADEPTNA 36 PCS MULTI-COLOURED SOFT EVA FOAM JIGSAW PLAY MAT LETTERS AND NUMBERS - ALPHABET FLOOR MAT FOR KIDS PLAY ROOM - EACH TILE MEASURES 17CM X 17CM X 1CM
features: MULTI-COLOURED PLAY MAT – This multi-coloured soft EVA foam children play mat features 36 puzzle foam pieces with pop-out letters and numbers.
POPULAR PLAY MAT - Featuring a full alphabet and numbers these mats are extremely popular in play rooms, schools and nurseries for learning and protecting against trips and falls on hard floors.
EDUCATIONAL TOY - They are ideal for baby/kids living room or play room, keep them safe at the same time these can be used as an educational toy as well, they can learn the numbers and letters.

PERFECT PLAY AREA - Manufactured from EVA soft foam, this set contains letters from ( A to Z ) 26 tiles & Numbers from 1 to 10 assorted colour pieces. These Play mats provide the perfect play area for your child, ideal for preventing bumps & falls on hard surfaces.
SIZE - EACH TILE MEASURES 17CM X 17CM X 1CM. EASY TO CLEAN AND STORE. SLIP RESISTANT SURFACE. SUITABLE FOR 3 YRS +
